g.text: Please use CSS style instead of skinparam ParticipantPadding
detect stock < 5 for at least one blood type
Edge case: stale/incorrect data → no state change
400 Error: Inventory data stale, alert not sent
When multiple blood types drop below 5 units simultaneously,
each drop triggers its own BloodTypeAlertOperation instance.
Operations are independent and do not interfere.
The same owner (Inventory_Management_Team) is enforced by the accessible set.
